title: Fifth-largest U.S. Pizza Chain Casey's Is Now The Official Pizza and Beer HeadquartersTM
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Casey's (Nasdaq: CASY) and pizza fans alike already knew it, but now there is a trademark to prove it. Announced today, Casey's is The Official Pizza and Beer HeadquartersTM. As the fifth-largest pizza chain and third-largest convenience store in the U.S., Casey's is a unique one-stop shop for anyone looking for handmade, delicious pizza and refreshing, ice-cold beer. According to a recent Casey's survey, pizza and beer is one of the best food and beverage pairing.

title: The Casey's Cash for Classrooms Grant Program Opens Call for Submissions
text: ANKENY, Iowa--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Casey's Cash for Classrooms grant program is now accepting submissions for 2024 grants through November 30, 2023. The grant program supports projects and initiatives taking place at accredited K-12 public and non-profit, private schools across the 16 states where Casey's operates stores. “The Casey's Cash for Classroom grant program has impacted hundreds of schools over the past three years.
